zh.Heron, East Hornden, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可易亞斯特 霍登
zh.Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France: 法國帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯
zh.Bishopsbourne, Kent, England: 英國肯特比曉普斯布恩
zh.Canterbury, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞
zh.Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Ken: 英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 奧古斯丁
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Haute於1390年出生在英國肯特比曉普斯布恩時，他的父親Nicholas Haute33歲，母親Alice Coven11387歲。他於1419年10月之前與Margaret Berwick在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1462年在英國肯特享年72歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 奧古斯丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Haute于1390年出生在英国肯特比曉普斯布恩时，他的父亲Nicholas Haute33岁，母亲Alice Coven11387岁。他于1419年10月之前与Margaret Berwick在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1462年在英国肯特享年72岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 奧古斯丁。

nameMeanings.name: Haute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname or status name from an argot word (thieves’ slang) in Bavaria and Austria for a peasant farmer (see   Hotz   1). Compare   Houts   and   Houtz  .

variants.name: Hotz
meanings: South German and Swiss German: from thieves' cant for a peasant or farmer, which in turn derives from an ancient Germanic personal name, Hugizo or Huzo, pet forms of a compound name formed with hug- as the first element (see, for example, Hubert , Hugh ).
South German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German hotzen ‘to run swiftly’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Haute was born in 1390, in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, his father, Nicholas Haute, was 33 and his mother, Alice Coven, was 11387. He married Margaret Berwick before October 1419, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1462, in Kent, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Ken: Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Haute est né en 1390, à Bishopsbourne, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Haute, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice Coven, avait 11387 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Berwick avant octobre 1419, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1462, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Haute 1390 in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Haute 33 und seine Mutter Alice Coven 11387. Er hat vor Oktober 1419 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Berwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1462 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, England begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Berwick prima del ottobre 1419, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1462, nel Kent, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hauteが1390年にイギリスケントビショプスボウルンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Hauteは33歳，母Alice Covenは11387歳であった。1419年10月以前にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Berwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1462年にイギリスケントで72歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリーカンテルブリー スト アウグスティンにて埋葬された。

ko.Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Ken: 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 오구스틴
ko.lifeSummary: William Haute(이)가 1390년 영국 켄트 비숍스번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Haute(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Coven(은)는 11387세였다. 그는 1419년 10월 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Berwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1462년 영국 켄트에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 오구스틴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Haute nasceu em 1390, em Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Haute, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alice Coven, tinha 11387 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Berwick antes outubro de 1419, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1462, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Ken: кантирбури ст аугустаин, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Haute родился в 1390 г. в местности бишопсбурн, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Haute было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Coven, 11387. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Berwick перед октябрь 1419 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1462 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности кантирбури ст аугустаин, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Berwick antes de octubre de 1419, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
